About Me

Passionate about crafting digital experiences

I'm a full-stack developer and UI/UX designer with a passion for building products that combine beautiful aesthetics with powerful functionality. I specialize in React, Node.js, and modern design systems.

When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring design trends, contributing to open source, or mentoring aspiring developers.

// About

I DESIGN &
ENGINEER
DIGITAL PRODUCTS.

With over 5 years in the industry, I help brands and startups build digital products that are both beautiful and performant. My approach blends design thinking with engineering precision.

I've worked across fintech, e-commerce, and SaaS verticals, always focusing on what matters most — the user. My toolkit includes React, TypeScript, Figma, and a strong eye for composition.

What I Offer

Services

Comprehensive solutions to help your business grow digitally.

Web Development

Custom web applications built with modern frameworks. Fast, scalable, and maintainable codebases.

UI/UX Design

User-centered design that converts. From wireframes to polished interfaces that users love.

Cloud & DevOps

Scalable infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud deployments on AWS, GCP, and Azure.

Mobile Apps

Cross-platform mobile apps with React Native for iOS and Android, with native feel.

SEO & Performance

Technical SEO audits and performance optimization for faster load times and better rankings.

AI Integration

Integrate GPT, Claude, and custom AI models into your products for intelligent automation.
